title: Planting Sunflowers
synopsis: A child learns that growing flowers takes patience, care, and time.
sentences: Nora found a packet of sunflower seeds in the garden shed.
She asked her grandfather if they could plant them together.
He brought a small spade, a watering can, and a pair of gloves for Nora.
They chose a sunny corner near the back fence.
Nora dug little holes in the soil and dropped one seed into each hole.
Then she covered them carefully with earth and gave them water.
Every morning after that, Nora went outside to check the ground.
At first she saw nothing at all.
Then, one week later, small green shoots pushed up through the soil.
Nora clapped her hands and called for her grandfather to come and see.
He told her that good things often need quiet time before they appear.
Nora decided she would care for the sunflowers all summer long.
